item.title: Pwning Supercomputers - A 20yo vulnerability in Munge
item.description: Exploiting Heap Buffer Overflow in the authentication daemon used by most High Performance Computer.

item.title: Attacking WSO2 Products
item.description: Uncovering bypasses, RCE, SSRF, CSRF, and account-takeover vulnerabilities in WSO2 products.

item.title: Sniffing established BLE connections with HackRF One
item.description: Tracking already-established BLE connections using SDR has its own challenges. With custom firmware and multi-channel listening, the presented approach quickly deduces the hidden hopping parameters needed to follow the connection.

item.title: Analysis of Secp0 Ransomware
item.description: The article analyzes the Secp0 ransomware, which emerged in early 2025 and operates as conventional double-extortion ransomware, encrypting data while threatening public disclosure, targeting Linux systems.

item.title: World Leaks: An Extortion Platform
item.description: This article provides an analysis of World Leaks, a new extortion platform that emerged in early 2025, detailing its origins, operational challenges, and collaborations with other threat actors.

item.title: Pre-authentication SQL injection to RCE in GLPI (CVE-2025-24799/CVE-2025-24801)
item.description: Exploitation of multiple vulnerabilities in GLPI to gain remote code execution from unauthenticated privileges.
